message:
feat: acceptance criteria gate in gt done

Add AcceptanceCriteria field to Issue struct and HasUncheckedCriteria()
helper. When a bead has unchecked acceptance criteria, gt done skips
closing it — the bead stays open for witness/mayor review.

From PR #1995.
Co-authored-by: caltobin <Atmosphere-Aviation@users.noreply.github.com>
